path: Problem: Return a spill-down list of labels associated with non-zero numeric values (filter rows by condition) without helper columns
Action: Use INDEX to return the nth matching item, with AGGREGATE(SMALL) to compute the nth qualifying row number, wrapped in IFERROR for blank-on-exhaustion

Observation: Converting qualifying rows into their row numbers and dividing by a Boolean mask creates errors for non-matches; AGGREGATE with option 6 ignores errors and returns the kth smallest qualifying row index
Problem: Add error handling so the output remains blank once all qualifying items are returned
Action: Wrap the extraction formula in IFERROR
Observation: When k exceeds the count of qualifying rows, AGGREGATE/INDEX returns an error that can be safely converted to an empty string
Problem: Change background color of returned (non-blank) results to a specific fill color
Action: Apply Conditional Formatting using a non-blank formula test and set fill color to #92D050
Observation: Conditional formatting can key off the displayed result; testing for non-empty avoids coloring unused rows
